title: UnitedHealth Group Company Overview
text: UnitedHealth Group is a health care and well-being company that operates through two complementary businesses: UnitedHealthcare and Optum. UnitedHealthcare provides health benefits for employers, individuals, Medicare beneficiaries, Medicaid and community programs, and other government-sponsored populations. Optum provides health services, care delivery, pharmacy care services, data, technology, analytics, consulting, and administrative solutions through Optum Health, Optum Insight, and Optum Rx. UnitedHealth Group reports four segments: UnitedHealthcare, Optum Health, Optum Insight, and Optum Rx. The company is important for investment analysis because its performance depends on membership growth, premium pricing, medical care costs, Medicare Advantage rates, Medicaid redeterminations, pharmacy services volume, value-based care execution, regulatory scrutiny, technology investment, cybersecurity, and the ability of Optum and UnitedHealthcare to work together across a large health care platform.
